name: Portal

draft.notes: Back-facing pack. Structure: an 8-card seeded run (1 tip card + 2 basic lands + 4 commons + 1 uncommon, cyclic order around the tip card) followed by 1 rare + 2 uncommons + 5 commons. Net game cards: 9 commons, 3 uncommons, 1 rare, 2 basic lands, plus 1 tip card. Seeded cards come from one of five allied-color-pair runs and are separate from the other commons/uncommons.

statedRates: Seeded runs not equally likely; the red/black run appears at ~half the rate of the others. No explicit pack-level rarity percentages stated.
sourceNotes: Small set with extra commons. Pre-foil era (1997), no foils. Each pack carries a 'tip card' (marketing/ad card, treated as adCard). Four variations of each basic land; 2 basic lands per pack via the seeded run. Printed in English in the USA (Belgian existence unknown). 36 packs per box. Some cards have alternate starter-deck versions with extra reminder text.
